worldDetails.backgroundSettings:
The world of "Action Mode Test," officially designated as Terranova-7, has just emerged from a protracted period of universal system default. All known historical records, complex societal structures, and advanced technological schematics were uniformly reset, leaving behind a verdant but largely unpopulated planet dotted with enigmatic, inert monolithic structures. Life has begun to re-flourish, returning to a more rudimentary state, yet the echoes of a prior existence resonate beneath the surface.
The current atmosphere is one of cautious rebirth and raw potential. Small, disparate communities are forming, each attempting to carve out an existence in this fresh, unscripted reality. Scavenging for resources among the remnants of the 'defaulted' era is common, as is the burgeoning development of new, often rudimentary, technologies and social hierarchies. An undercurrent of primal energy pervades the land, hinting at both untamed dangers and undiscovered wonders waiting to be harnessed by the bold.
worldDetails.campaignGoal: The overarching objective is to navigate the chaos of a freshly reset world, forging a new destiny for its nascent inhabitants while uncovering the true purpose behind the universal default.

factions.name: The Reclaimers
factions.description: Groups dedicated to salvaging technology and knowledge from the pre-default era, believing past glories can be restored.

factions.name: The Verdant Path
factions.description: Communities focused on living in harmony with the revitalized natural world, shunning old tech as the cause of the default.

factions.name: The Architects of Tomorrow
factions.description: Visionaries attempting to build entirely new societies and systems, unburdened by the past.

locations.name: The Spire of Silence
locations.description: An ancient, inert tower radiating an unsettling calm, its purpose unknown.

locations.name: Whisperwind Valley
locations.description: A fertile valley where strange, soft sounds can sometimes be heard on the wind, hinting at latent energies.

locations.name: The Sunken Archives
locations.description: A partially submerged complex believed to contain remnants of pre-default data, guarded by aquatic flora and fauna.

artifacts.name: Resonator Shard
artifacts.description: A small, crystalline fragment that hums with a faint, unusual energy when held, sometimes reacting to specific locations.

artifacts.name: Chronos Compass
artifacts.description: A device that always points to 'something important,' but its definition of 'important' is enigmatic and often changes.

artifacts.name: Echo-Tablet
artifacts.description: A smooth, dark tablet that occasionally flickers with faint, indecipherable symbols, possibly fragments of lost knowledge.

messages.content: The tavern door swings open abruptly.
